title: Disability
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'disability'?
Some people prefer to use the term 'physically challenged' instead of 'disabled'. What do you think about this?
Do you always try to help people who are disabled?
Do you tend to think that disabled people always need your help?
What things do you think disability rights groups campaign for?
What do you think of the Paralympic Games (which means 'alongside the Olympic games')?
What should people do on the International Day of Persons with Disabilities?
What tax breaks or financial aid should people with disabilities get?
